'''Orline''' was the third [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Carida system/Legends|Carida system]]. It was a world composed of [[Methane/Legends|methane]] seas, and had one [[Moon/Legends|moon]]. Like all the planets in the Carida [[Star system/Legends|system]], it was destroyed by the [[Sun Crusher]].
